name: revenant
description: The Revenant citadel — marketplace of Revenant Agent Skill packs. Each pack installs as one plugin; every skill inside stands alone.

plugins.name: foundation
plugins.description: Eight standalone smiths: skillsmith (skills & packs), promptsmith (prompts), commsmith (messages), agentsmith (agent specs), loresmith (research verdicts & playbooks), evalsmith (eval suites), brandsmith (brand & drift), tokensmith (token footprint). Each routes on its own description and works alone; together they cover the full build-audit-ship loop.
